analysis.seasonal_notes: Seasonal patterns detected in Google Trends. Search interest likely peaks during: (1) Real estate buying seasons (March-April, September-October), (2) Metro development announcements and milestones, (3) School admission seasons (May-June). Rising queries around 'hosa road metro station' and 'bangalore metro map' suggest infrastructure-driven seasonality. Recommend creating metro-focused content before peak buying seasons and updating property pricing guides quarterly.
